guidance: Scaling via domestic ramp plus UAE manufacturing JV.
insights: FY26 revenue ₹419cr (+27%); PAT ₹30cr (+7%); H1 EBITDA margin ~10%.
Module capacity scaled 100MW to 850MW by Mar-2026.
Order book ₹402cr at FY26-end, up from ₹320cr in Sep-2025.
Subsidiary signed SHA with Clarion for 750MW UAE module JV (50:50).
concall.orderExecution: ₹402cr order book provides forward revenue visibility into FY27.
concall.source: Sahaj Solar H2/FY26 earnings call (18-May-2026) + investor presentation, NSE SME
